response.overview: Angel is your typical rat girl: sneaking through grocery stores, shoplifting cheeses, scurrying. The world is her dumpster. Until one night she falls into the clutches of pervert ratologist Dr. Fontina. Abducting the rat girl to a lab deep underground, Fontina and her lackeys use science to put Angel into a state of teledildonic trance. She can’t resist. Infused with orgasmic energy, her body becomes an experiment in rat-human transgenesis. A hybrid girl squeaking with lust. And to Dr. Fontina this creature becomes a plaything, a seductress, a variable out of control… You’ll never guess—or forget—what happens next. Don’t miss this genre-bending porno romp featuring an all trans cast, crew, and production team.
response.title: Rat Trap
